summary: Code quality audit cleanup verification complete. All 8 features tested successfully: Homepage, Immobilier, Procedures pages load without errors. OTP verification page works correctly. DashboardTabs and FichePreview components with useMemo render properly. Navigation between pages works. safeUrl XSS protection implemented in rich editors. Array index keys replaced with stable keys.

console_warnings.issue: HTML hydration warning: span cannot be child of option/select - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: safeUrl function correctly blocks javascript:, data:, vbscript: protocols in AdvancedRichEditor.js and RichEditor.js
useMemo properly implemented in DashboardTabs.js (topViewed, categoryBars, countryCards) and FichePreview.js (filtered steps, details, fees)
Array index keys replaced with stable keys: BlockEditor.js (th-h-i format), ChatHelp.js (item.question), PriceReferencesTab.js (city-commune-quartier composite), VerifyOTPPage.js (otp-pos-i)
PropertyFormPage.js: set() wrapped in useCallback, handleMapClick deps fixed
WebSocket connection warning for chat is pre-existing and not related to this audit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality audit fixes verified: 1) XSS protection via safeUrl in rich editors, 2) useMemo for expensive calculations in DashboardTabs and FichePreview, 3) Stable React keys replacing array indices, 4) useCallback/useEffect dependency fixes. All main pages load without crashes. Cookie auth still working from iteration 37.

verified: No key={i} or key={index} patterns found
